pageContext.name: R@bbrick Lola Bunny 100% & 400%
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom are proud to present the R@bbrick Lola Bunny 100% and 400% Collectible Set!  These figures stand at approximately 11.02' and 2.75' tall and feature the drop-dead gorgeous Lola Bunny who the one and only Bugs Bunny goes ga-ga over.  Don't miss your chance to add this Lola Bunny R@bbrick to your collection today!
